text.title: PWA Development Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the app intended to be installable AND offline-capable?

conclusion.verdict: skip; static site or plain web app instead

branch.question: Are all required manifest fields + icons present?
Is the shell route cached cache-first?

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
